name: Delayed Tasks
query:
SELECT 
    t.name AS "Task ID",
    t.task_name AS "Task Name",
    t.project AS "Project",
    t.assigned_to AS "Assigned To",
    t.end_date AS "End Date",
    DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), t.end_date) AS "Days Overdue"
FROM `tabTask` t
WHERE t.end_date < CURDATE() AND t.status != 'Completed'
ORDER BY "Days Overdue" DESC;
